USER-6bb5e062

Details

Rule Type
Global
Applies To
Differential Revisions

Description

When any of these conditions are met:

Repository is any of rMOZILLACENTRAL mozilla-central, rNSS nss, rCIADMIN ci-admin, rCICONFIG ci-configuration, rPINE Pine, rCOMMCENTRAL comm-central, rBETA mozilla-beta, rRELEASE mozilla-release, rESRONEONEFIVE mozilla-esr115, rFIREFOXAUTOLAND firefox-autoland, rFIREFOXBETA firefox-beta, rFIREFOXESRONETWOEIGHT firefox-esr128, rFIREFOXRELEASE firefox-release, rFIREFOXESRONEONEFIVE firefox-esr115

Take these actions every time this rule matches:

Run build plans: Plan 6 Source Code Analysis.
